title: rhinanthus minor var. hercynicus
intro: Rhinanthus minor var. hercynicus, also known as the lesser yellow-rattlesnake or Hercynian broomrape, is a flowering plant that belongs to the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae). This parasitic plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhinanthus minor var. hercynicus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
